macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Economic Data Released: ADP Employment, CPI, and Jobless Claims
items.summary: Key US economic indicators were released including ADP Employment Change of 109K (vs 61K forecast), Core Inflation Rate MoM at 0.38% (vs 0.31% forecast), and Initial Jobless Claims at 189K. The data shows mixed signals with employment beating expectations but inflation remaining elevated.

items.title: Norway's Norges Bank Hikes Policy Rate; Further Tightening Expected
items.summary: Norway's central bank raised its policy rate in May with expectations for one more hike this year as inflation remains above target despite higher-than-expected levels. The Norwegian krone has strengthened and may continue to appreciate, particularly against the USD.

items.title: Arcutis Biotherapeutics Misses Q1 2026 EPS Expectations
items.summary: Arcutis Biotherapeutics reported Q1 2026 earnings that missed EPS expectations, causing the stock to fall 11.78% in after-hours trading. The earnings miss reflects investor concerns about the company's financial performance.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Market Hits $2.7T Amid Mixed Performance
items.summary: The cryptocurrency market reached $2.7 trillion with Bitcoin trading around $80,737 (down 1.36%) and Ethereum at $2,281 (down 2.32%). Notable gainers included Black Phoenix ($BPX) with a 3356.67% surge, while DeFi TVL declined 0.94% to $85.86B.

items.title: Crypto Futures Liquidations Surge Past $127 Million in 24 Hours
items.summary: The cryptocurrency perpetual futures market experienced significant liquidations exceeding $127 million, with Bitcoin accounting for $62.44 million (57.02% long positions) and Ethereum at $45.07 million (81.07% long positions), indicating extreme market volatility.

items.title: Bitcoin Holds Above $80K Despite Hot CPI Report
items.summary: Bitcoin remained resilient above $80,000 following a hotter-than-expected April CPI report of 3.8%, while U.S. equities declined. The cryptocurrency market slipped only 0.5% compared to sharper declines in traditional markets.

items.title: Rising Inflation Pressures Crypto Markets
items.summary: Bitcoin fell 1.8% and Ethereum dropped 2.9% as U.S. headline CPI reached 3.8% year-over-year, the highest in three years. Bhutan's sale of another 100 Bitcoins contributed to downward pressure, with the Fear and Greed Index at neutral 49.

items.title: INK Finance Suffers $140K Loss from Whitelist Bypass Hack
items.summary: INK Finance experienced a security breach resulting in $140,000 loss due to a whitelist bypass hack targeting the platform's treasury infrastructure.

items.title: Aptos Develops Transfer Layer to Eliminate Frontrunning
items.summary: Aptos is developing a new transfer layer technology designed to permanently eliminate frontrunning in blockchain transactions.

items.title: Ark Invest Purchases $5.5M in Circle Shares
items.summary: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest purchased Circle shares worth $5.5 million across 3 ETFs amid a 16% stock surge for the cryptocurrency payment platform.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Meta hires four more OpenAI researchers
items.summary: Meta has recruited four OpenAI researchers—Shengjia Zhao, Jiahui Yu, Shuchao Bi, and Hongyu Ren—as part of its ongoing efforts to strengthen its AI capabilities and talent acquisition.

items.title: Apple to open up underlying AI technology to developers
items.summary: Apple is making its underlying AI technology available to developers, expanding access to its AI capabilities for third-party application development.

items.title: AI and cybersecurity: Takeaways from RSAC 2026
items.summary: Security professionals at RSAC 2026 discussed AI's dual role in cybersecurity—its potential to automate SOC tasks and improve efficiency, alongside emerging threats including ransomware automation and AI agent hijacking vulnerabilities.

items.title: AI scores high as a math learning tool in new survey
items.summary: A new survey reveals that 68% of students use AI tools for math assignments and exams, with nearly 70% of top-performing math students incorporating AI into their study habits.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Helldivers 2 Players React to Major Update Decision
items.summary: Helldivers 2 community expresses concerns following a significant game update that includes changes to major orders and the introduction of free strata gems. Players await announcement of the next major order in the ongoing Galactic War.

items.title: Guild Wars 2 'The Only Way' Patch Goes Live
items.summary: Guild Wars 2 releases a major patch featuring six new relics, homestead decoration recipes, raid fixes, and graphics improvements including custom shadow options. The update kicks off a new quarter with upcoming events including Dragon Bash in June and PvP rush in July.

items.title: The Division Resurgence Receives Classified Ops 1.2.2 Update
items.summary: The Division Resurgence launches a new season title update adding new fights, rewards, and challenges. The update includes targeted loot changes and new escalation event features.

items.title: NBA 2K26 Receives Patch Improvements
items.summary: NBA 2K26 receives a patch update that players report improves overall gameplay experience.

items.title: Pragmata's Lunar NYC Level Praised as 2026's Best
items.summary: Capcom's Pragmata receives critical acclaim for its lunar recreation of New York City, which is being highlighted as one of the standout level designs of 2026.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Micron Technology Launches 256GB DDR5 Memory for AI Data Centers
items.summary: Micron Technology has sampled advanced 256GB DDR5 RDIMMs built on its 1 gamma process, delivering over 40% higher speed and improved energy efficiency compared to existing DDR5 solutions for next-generation servers.
